creator: void@f-m.fm
text:
Created attachment 240258
poudriere testport log

Hello,

This port builds fine on amd64 but not on arm64 baremetal. The poudriere jail is freshly made 13.1-RELEASE-p7 1301000 00935d2e5 arm64.aarch64 2023-02-17 03:41:17 with a minimal make.conf for that jail. There is no system-wide make.conf.

prior to starting the build, /usr/ports/distiles was deleted then re-created.

I've attached the full poudriere log made with
poudriere testport -v -v -j test net/termshark. But, in brief, it fails here:

[00:04:42] github.com/klauspost/compress/zip
[00:04:42] nhooyr.io/websocket
[00:04:42] github.com/gcla/termshark/v2/configs/profiles
[00:04:42] github.com/gcla/termshark/v2/pkg/theme
[00:04:43] nhooyr.io/websocket/wsjson
[00:04:43] github.com/psanford/wormhole-william/rendezvous
[00:04:43] github.com/psanford/wormhole-william/wormhole
[00:04:44] *** Error code 1
[00:04:44] 
[00:04:44] Stop.
[00:04:44] make: stopped in /usr/ports/net/termshark
[00:05:48] build of net/termshark | termshark-2.4.0_7 ended at Sun Feb 19 08:53:00 GMT 2023
[00:05:48] build time: 00:05:26
[00:05:48] !!! build failure encountered !!!
[00:05:48] Error: Build failed in phase: build
[00:05:48] Logs: /usr/local/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/test-default/2023-02-19_08h47m12s
